prompt: A dreamy cinematic fantasy night scene on a calm reflective sea under a deep indigo star-filled sky, with 1 large full moon in the upper left and the Milky Way stretching diagonally across the background. In the center, a slender woman with black long straight hair walks barefoot across the shallow mirror-like water from left to right, shown in elegant full body profile. She wears a shimmering translucent silver evening gown with a fitted sparkling bodice, thin straps, a flowing gauzy skirt, and a high slit revealing one leg, the fabric trailing in the breeze. Around her right side, a curved arc of glowing magical particles forms 1 crescent-shaped trail made of luminous white roses, petals, and tiny lights, rising from the water near her reflection and curling upward beside her. Beneath her on the reflective surface appears a fantastical mirrored image: 1 glowing transparent white tiger lying on its side, rendered like liquid light and stardust, detailed with bright stripes and a softly radiant face. The water is glassy with subtle ripples and crisp reflections of the woman, moon, stars, and magical light. Low dark islands sit on the distant horizon. At the bottom center, add elegant luminous cursive text reading In me the tiger sniffs the rose. Ultra-detailed, ethereal, poetic, photoreal fantasy art, soft moonlight, cool blue palette, high contrast, gentle bloom, mystical atmosphere, widescreen composition.
